channel.title: GitHub Unknown languages Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Unknown languages in GitHub

item.title: PatrickJS/awesome-cursorrules
item.description: 📄 A curated list of awesome .cursorrules files

item.title: ashishpatel26/500-AI-Machine-learning-Deep-learning-Computer-vision-NLP-Projects-with-code
item.description: 500 AI Machine learning Deep learning Computer vision NLP Projects with code

item.title: jwasham/coding-interview-university
item.description: A complete computer science study plan to become a software engineer.

item.title: DopplerHQ/awesome-interview-questions
item.description: A curated awesome list of lists of interview questions. Feel free to contribute! 🎓

item.title: alex/what-happens-when
item.description: An attempt to answer the age old interview question "What happens when you type google.com into your browser and press enter?"

item.title: kelseyhightower/kubernetes-the-hard-way
item.description: Bootstrap Kubernetes the hard way. No scripts.

item.title: ossu/computer-science
item.description: 🎓 Path to a free self-taught education in Computer Science!

item.title: justjavac/free-programming-books-zh_CN
item.description: 📚 免费的计算机编程类中文书籍，欢迎投稿

item.title: phmullins/awesome-macos
item.description: A curated list of awesome software for Apple's macOS.
